description: Rule with the per-axis boundary_policy form and ghost_width (RFC §5.2.8 / §7, esm-bet). Exercises a per-axis boundary_policy (a distinct kind on each axis) plus a non-zero per-axis ghost_width. The rule engine itself does not branch on either field — bindings preserve them across parse/serialize and apply the replacement unconditionally — so the rewrite output here is a straightforward index-substitution. The fixture's purpose is to confirm every binding parses both authorial forms (per-axis boundary_policy object; per-axis ghost_width object) without error and rewrites the rule normally.
